prompt: A robot arm reaches for a large glowing red BUY button with a price tag on it. The room is dim with blinking warning lights. No human is present. Unchecked documents pile up on a desk beside the button. A monitor shows a campaign ready to launch. The scene feels tense and unsupervised — this is the nightmare scenario of AI spending money without oversight. Moody lighting with red accents against the dark teal palette. The robot is powerful but unchecked. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A robot arm reaches for a glowing red BUY button in a dim room with warning lights — no human present, unchecked documents pile up, a campaign ready to launch unsupervised

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, wearing a fitted sage-green cardigan over a white collared shirt) stands at a large wall-mounted display reviewing a campaign plan that just arrived. The plan appears on screen as a structured blueprint with abstract budget and timeline shapes. A subtle notification glow at the top of the screen indicates the buying agent submitted it. Jordan holds a tablet in one hand, cross-referencing something. Her posture is attentive and purposeful — this is the first human checkpoint. Bright, organized office with a standing desk nearby. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan stands at a wall-mounted display reviewing a campaign plan, tablet in hand for cross-reference — the first human checkpoint after the agent submitted it

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) sits on a stool at a high table with her laptop open, reviewing automated check results on screen. Three status indicators are visible — one glows amber (budget near limit), two glow green (brand safety, compliance). Jordan taps the amber indicator with one finger, zooming in. She's in a bright collaborative workspace, not a traditional desk — maybe a kitchen counter or standing-height table in the agency's open area. Her expression is focused and analytical. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan reviews automated governance checks on her laptop at a high table — one amber warning for budget, two green passes — she taps the amber indicator to dig in

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) walks through a glass-walled corridor toward a meeting room, holding her tablet with the flagged campaign visible on it. The tablet screen glows amber. Through the glass walls you can see the agency's open floor — colleagues working, screens with dashboards. Jordan's stride is purposeful, not panicked. She's bringing this to a decision point. The glass corridor metaphor shows the escalation is transparent and structured. Warm afternoon light. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan walks through a glass corridor toward a meeting room, tablet showing the amber-flagged campaign — purposeful stride, transparent escalation

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) taps an approval on her tablet, which emits a green glow. She's standing near a window with warm light. From the tablet, a green approval signal and a smaller amber condition tag flow outward along a teal data stream toward a stylized representation of the campaign going live — abstract shapes of screens and devices in the distance. Jordan's expression is confident and decisive — she made the judgment call, added conditions, and set it in motion. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan taps approval on her tablet near a window — a green signal and amber condition tag flow outward toward the campaign going live

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) checks her phone while walking through the agency, a slight smile on her face. The phone screen shows a compact campaign monitoring dashboard with green status indicators and rising metrics. Through large windows behind her, a stylized cityscape shows ads running — a billboard, a phone screen held by a pedestrian, a TV in an apartment window. Data flows subtly from the city toward her phone. She's not chained to a desk — the system comes to her. Warm evening light. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan checks campaign metrics on her phone while walking through the agency — through the windows, a cityscape shows ads running on billboards, phones, and TVs

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) presents the audit trail to two colleagues in a bright meeting room. She stands at a large screen showing a horizontal timeline with glowing nodes — a document, an amber flag, a person silhouette, a green seal, a rocket, and a chart. One colleague sits with a laptop, another leans against the table with an iPad. Jordan gestures at the timeline, walking them through each decision. She owns this narrative. The room is well-lit, professional, and the mood is confident — everything is accounted for. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan presents the audit trail timeline to colleagues in a meeting room — one with a laptop, one with an iPad — she gestures through each decision point
